name: alpaca-vscode
description: FIM code completion and git commit message generation with llama.cpp

alpaca-vscode.completion_endpoint.description: alpaca.cpp server URL for FIM code completion.

alpaca-vscode.completion_api_key.description: API key for the completion endpoint.

alpaca-vscode.commit_endpoint.description: Chat endpoint URL for git commit message generation.

alpaca-vscode.commit_model.description: Model name for the commit message endpoint (e.g. google/gemini-2.5-flash).

alpaca-vscode.commit_api_key.description: API key for the commit endpoint.

alpaca-vscode.commit_api_version.description: API version path appended to commit_endpoint.

alpaca-vscode.self_signed_certificate.description: Path to a self-signed CA certificate file.

alpaca-vscode.language_settings.description: Per-language completion toggles. Key = languageId, value = true/false.

alpaca-vscode.show_info.description: Show completion performance stats in the status bar.

alpaca-vscode.auto.description: Trigger completions automatically as you type (false = only via Alt+Space).

alpaca-vscode.debounce_ms.description: Debounce delay (ms) before triggering automatic completion.

alpaca-vscode.n_prefix.description: Lines of text before the cursor to include as prefix context.

alpaca-vscode.n_suffix.description: Lines of text after the cursor to include as suffix context.

alpaca-vscode.n_predict.description: Max tokens to generate per completion.

alpaca-vscode.t_max_prompt_ms.description: Max time (ms) allowed for prompt processing.

alpaca-vscode.t_max_predict_ms.description: Max time (ms) allowed for token generation.

alpaca-vscode.max_line_suffix.description: Skip auto completion when cursor is more than N chars before end of line.

alpaca-vscode.max_cache_keys.description: Max entries in the FIM result cache.

alpaca-vscode.ring_n_chunks.description: Max chunks in the context ring buffer.

alpaca-vscode.ring_scope.description: Lines around the cursor to consider for ring buffer chunks.

alpaca-vscode.ring_update_ms.description: How often (ms) to process queued ring buffer chunks.
